mapper.sql: id, agent_profile_id AS agentProfileId, version, name, role_prompt AS rolePrompt, CAST(model_policy_json AS CHAR) AS modelPolicyJson, CAST(skill_refs_json AS CHAR) AS skillRefsJson, CAST(tool_allowlist_json AS CHAR) AS toolAllowlistJson, CAST(authority_json AS CHAR) AS authorityJson, status
mapper.select: SELECT FROM subagent_profile WHERE agent_profile_id = #{agentProfileId} ORDER BY id, version DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO subagent_profile ( id, agent_profile_id, version, name, role_prompt, model_policy_json, skill_refs_json, tool_allowlist_json, authority_json, status ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{agentProfileId}, #{version}, #{name}, #{rolePrompt}, CAST(#{modelPolicyJson} AS JSON), CAST(#{skillRefsJson} AS JSON), CAST(#{toolAllowlistJson} AS JSON), CAST(#{authorityJson} AS JSON), #{status} )
